title: Sessions & VP with prev session VP & daily/weekly opens
author: lucymatos
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Sessions & VP with prev session VP & daily/weekly opens by lucymatos.

This indicator combines two fully independent volume profile pipelines into a single overlay — one tracking the current session in real time, and one tracking the previous session — along with optional forex session boxes and daily/weekly open levels.

Both volume profiles are built from lower-timeframe intraday bar data (request.security_lower_tf), meaning each profile reflects the true distribution of volume across the session's price range rather than a single-bar approximation.
